summary: Phase 1.6 E2E listing workflow UI: dual-path state machine modal launched from approved list_products task; integrates generateProductDraft at draft review; session-scoped navigation with Vietnamese labels. No backend or TikTok API calls.

interfaceChanges.description: list_products approval opens listing workflow modal; returns listingWorkflowOpen and closeListingWorkflow.
Session hook for Path A/B state machine and draft generation.
Deterministic opportunity filter for Path B browse step.

mappings.criterion: Approving list_products in New Seller Copilot opens listing workflow
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::opens listing workflow when list_products is approved

mappings.criterion: Path A flow form distributor pick draft review step mounts
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::reaches draft review with generated draft from rules engine

mappings.criterion: Path B flow constraints opportunity browse distributor pick draft review
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::shows filtered opportunities in the browse step

mappings.criterion: State machine exposes current step back navigation preserves session data
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::preserves session data when navigating back from distributor pick

mappings.criterion: Other task types still show Phase 1 no-op feedback
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::keeps Phase 1 no-op feedback for non-list_products tasks

mappings.criterion: Integration test approve list_products listing workflow UI visible data-testid marker
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::opens listing workflow when list_products is approved

mappings.criterion: Integration test Path A reaches draft review with generated draft from rules engine
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::reaches draft review with generated draft from rules engine

mappings.criterion: Integration test Path B opportunity filter with fixed constraints returns deterministic card set
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::returns deterministic card set for fixed constraints

mappings.criterion: Workflow works in UI-only mode without backend calls
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::does not call backend APIs during workflow

mappings.criterion: map.md planned module row updated when code lands
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::map.md documents deployed listing workflow UI module row
